compositionPolicy.provider: Context follows React descendants and portals without adding DOM.
compositionPolicy.boundary: Boundary writes the native dir attribute and context together.
compositionPolicy.sides: Public placement APIs use start/end; resolveLogicalSide is reserved for physical-coordinate integrations.
compositionPolicy.advantage: Native dir and React context change atomically, including a deterministic logical-to-physical side helper.
compositionPolicy.enhancementOptOut: With isolate=false the isolation attribute and unicode-bidi behavior are absent; direction context and native dir remain.
